title: Balaji Sapphire
excerpt: Welcome to Balaji Sapphire, an extraordinary G+14 storeyed tower offering. 2BHK & 3BHK premium residences.
description: Balaji Sapphire is an architectural marvel that redefines upscale living. The modern glasswork, elegant entrance lobby, and spacious balconies create an atmosphere of sophistication. Every element, from aesthetic detailing to functional layouts, has been curated for the perfect living experience.
site_address: Plot No.56, Sector - 19A, Nerul, Navi Mumbai - 400 706.

title: Balaji Park
